landing.metaTitle: BillTracker — Never miss a due date again
landing.metaDescription: Upload a bill: BillTracker reads the amount and due date for you, reminds you by email and adds it to your calendar. Free.
landing.heroText: Upload a bill and BillTracker reads the amount and due date for you, warns you by email before it's due and adds it to your calendar. No late fees, no surprises.

features.heading: Everything you need, in one place
features.sub: From the photo of the bill to the reminder: BillTracker handles the boring steps, you just pay on time.

scan.title: Automatic reading
scan.text: Upload a PDF or a photo: AI extracts the amount, due date and category in seconds.

reminders.title: Email reminders
reminders.text: A heads-up in your inbox before every due date. No more late fees, dunning letters or shut-offs.

calendar.title: Google Calendar
calendar.text: Every due date lands on your calendar by itself, complete with a notification on your phone.

family.title: Family accounts
family.text: Share bills with your family group: everyone sees what's due and who's taking care of it.

analytics.title: Spending insights
analytics.text: Clear charts to understand where your money goes, month by month and category by category.

market.title: Market comparison
market.text: Find out if you pay more than the national average (ARERA and AGCOM data) and when it's worth switching provider.

step1.title: Upload or snap
step1.text: Paper bill or PDF received by email: two taps are enough to upload it.

step2.title: AI reads it for you
step2.text: Amount, due date and category are filled in automatically. You check and confirm.

step3.title: Pay on time
step3.text: Reminders by email and on your calendar. You pay, mark it as paid, and on to the next one.

cta.title: Ready to never forget a due date again?
cta.text: Create your free account and upload your first bill: BillTracker will remember it for you.

auth.tagline: Never miss a due date again. Upload a bill and let BillTracker extract the amount and date for you.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your bills.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: All you need is an email and a password.
register.name: Name

unverified.title: Email pending verification
unverified.text: Check your inbox and click the link we sent you. Also check the spam folder.

errors.passwordMin: The password must be at least 8 characters

contact.metaDescription: How to reach the person running BillTracker.
contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: For questions, reports or suggestions about BillTracker, these are the app manager's contact details.

upcoming.title: Upcoming bills
upcoming.empty: No bills coming up. You're all caught up! 🎉

dashboard.emptyText: Upload a bill and BillTracker will extract the amount, due date and category for you.

bills.benchmarkHint: Comparison with the market average — open details

detail.calendarNotConnected: Connect Google Calendar from your Profile to sync.
detail.calendarExpired: Google authorization expired: reconnect your account from the Profile.

form.title: Title
form.recurringHint: Automatically creates the next due date with the chosen frequency.
form.emptyAmount: Leave the amount empty — I'll fill it in when the bill arrives
form.recurrenceSummary: A new bill will be created {freq}.
form.recurrenceSummaryFrom: A new bill will be created {freq} starting from {date}.

upload.title: New bill
upload.subtitleParsing: Upload the document: we extract the amount, date and category for you.

analytics.monthsRecorded: {count, plural, one {over # recorded month} other {over # recorded months}}
analytics.avgNote: {count, plural, one {Average computed over # month with recorded data{range}.} other {Average computed over # months with recorded data{range}.}}
analytics.noData: No data recorded in the last 12 months.
analytics.yoyInsufficient: Not enough data for the yearly comparison.

family.title: Family group
family.subtitle: Share bills with your family. Members see shared bills and receive reminders.
family.empty: You're not part of any group. Create one to share bills.

page.integrationsHint: Turn notification channels on or off.
page.contactHint: Questions or issues? The manager's contact details

google.feedbackError: Connecting to Google failed. Try again.
google.autoEventsHint: Adds a calendar reminder for every new bill.
google.connectHint: By connecting Google Calendar you can automatically add a reminder for every bill. Bills are saved anyway even without the connection. If you signed in with Google before this update, sign out and back in with Google (or use the Connect button) to grant the calendar permission.

reminders.title: Email reminders
reminders.schedule: Alerts 14 and 7 days before, daily over the last 3 days until the due date, then daily until you pay.
reminders.emailHint: Leave empty to use your sign-in email ({email}). It can be a secondary address or a family member's.

danger.confirm: Permanently delete the account? All documents and all bills will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
danger.title: Delete account
danger.text: Permanently deletes the account, all uploaded documents and all bills. This cannot be undone.

benchmarks.title: Market benchmarks
benchmarks.subtitle: Reference average prices (ARERA for electricity/gas, AGCOM for phone/internet). Update the values every quarter from the official sources — no SQL migrations.

contact.title: Contact page
contact.subtitle: The details shown on the public page <pageLink>/contatti</pageLink>. Changes are visible to all visitors immediately.

proposals.title: Update proposals
proposals.subtitle: Automatically collected values awaiting your confirmation. No price is published without your approval.

pwa.installText: Add it to your home screen to open it like an app.

actionErrors.errOnlyOwnerRename: Only the owner can rename the group
actionErrors.errOnlyOwnerInvite: Only the owner can invite members
actionErrors.errNoUserWithEmail: No registered user with this email. Ask them to sign up first.
actionErrors.errOnlyOwnerRemove: Only the owner can remove members
actionErrors.errOwnerCannotLeave: The owner cannot leave: delete the group instead
actionErrors.errOnlyOwnerDelete: Only the owner can delete the group
actionErrors.errProposalNotFound: Proposal not found or already handled
